experience.title: Information Technology Supervisor
experience.description: Supervise up to 10 personnel at one time, delegating tasks, conducting performance evaluations and providing corrective counseling as necessary. Train personnel in the set-up and proper use of IT related equipment while adhering to all policies and procedures. Responsible for the inventory of over $1 million worth of network communications equipment.

experience.title: Information Technology Technician
experience.description: Maintained communications equipment in order to effectively relay confidential and secret information. Utilized electronic test equipment to troubleshoot malfunctioning communications equipment and complete repairs as necessary.

experience.title: Radiology Technologist
experience.description: Routinely performed radiological examinations in a medical clinic. Competent and experienced in the set-up and adjustment of medical devices or equipment.

experience.title: Command Post Controller
experience.description: Provided command, control, communications, and information support throughout operations during peacetime, emergency, and disaster situations.

extra_fields.awards: Army Achievement Medal, Air Force Achievement Medal, Certificate of Achievement, Good Conduct Medal
